NOT.description: Thumb flicking forward from under the chin

DON'T.description: Index finger wagging side to side

NEVER.description: Flat hand carving a downward arc in the air

BYE.description: Palm forward, fingers together, waving side to side at head height

WELCOME.description: Palm up, arcing from the side toward the center of the chest (classic ISL welcome/invite)

AGAIN.description: Index and Middle fingers (V-shape) flicking forward twice

WHY.description: Right hand palm up, fingers slightly curled, shaking side to side at chest level

HOW.description: Both palms facing each other, then rotating outward to palm-up position

SEE.description: Index finger moving forward from eye level (Common ISL variant)

CAN.description: Thumb-up handshape moving slightly downward (ISL specific for 'Can/Ability')

PLEASE.description: Flat hand on chest, circular motion

NO.description: Two fingers shaking side to side

HELP.description: Right fist on left palm, lifting

NAME.description: Two fingers tapping on other hand

GOOD.description: Flat hand from mouth moving forward

MOTHER.description: Open hand with thumb tapping chin

FATHER.description: Open hand with thumb tapping forehead

BROTHER.description: Index finger rubs side of nose

SISTER.description: Pinky finger near corner of mouth

TEACHER.description: Pinched fingers moving forward from head

SAD.description: Hands in front of face moving down

WHERE.description: Index finger shaking side to side

UNDERSTAND.description: Index finger flicking up at forehead

PLEASE_NAMASTE.description: Palms together in front of chest

BAD.description: Flat hand from mouth flipping down

I.description: Index finger pointing to own chest

LOVE.description: Both arms crossed over chest in a self-hug

COME.description: Index finger curling to beckon toward body

GO.description: Index finger pointing forward away from body

WANT.description: Both claw hands pulling toward body

KNOW.description: Flat hand tapping side of forehead

TODAY.description: Both forearms pointing down indicating present moment

YESTERDAY.description: Thumb at cheek moves backward over shoulder

MORNING.description: Right arm rising over left horizontal arm like the sun

NIGHT.description: Bent right hand arcs over left horizontal arm

STOP.description: Right open palm strikes down onto left horizontal palm

NOW.description: Both palms facing up, dropping slightly in front of the body

LATER.description: L-handshape moving forward from the side of the head

WAIT.description: Both hands with fingers wiggling in front of body

FINISH.description: Both open hands flicking outward from palms-in to palms-out

LIKE.description: Pinching motion at chest pulling away

DO.description: Both hands in C shapes moving in small circles

READ.description: Two fingers scanning the left palm

ANGRY.description: Fingers clawed, moving from stomach up to chest

SCARED.description: Both hands open, palms facing body, shaking near chest

HUNGRY.description: Right hand rubbing stomach in a circle

THIRSTY.description: Index finger running down the throat

BORED.description: Index finger twisting at the cheek

EXCITED.description: Middle fingers brushing up chest alternately

LIVE.description: L-handshapes on both hands moving upward from the waist to the chest

HE.description: Index finger pointing to the right (representing a third person)

SHE.description: Index finger pointing to the right (representing a third person)

IT.description: Index finger pointing downward toward an object or location

NEAR.description: Two flat hands moving close together

FRONT.description: Flat hand moving forward from chest

BACK.description: Thumb pointing back over the shoulder

INSIDE.description: Right hand fingers move into a cup formed by left hand

WHAT.description: Dominant index finger shaking side to side

WHEN.description: Right index finger circling left index finger

WHICH.description: Alternating thumbs-up moving up and down

SLEEP.description: Palm resting at cheek, head tilts

TIRED.description: Both bent arms drop forward and down

SICK.description: Middle finger touches forehead then stomach
